blockedReasons.summary: Chat readiness keeps send controls disabled.
No prompt capture, echo, persistence, or retention policy exists.
No reviewed local artifact input boundary exists for composer attachments.
No local chat runtime has been implemented or started.

composerControls.label: focus input
composerControls.launcherAction: Render placeholder input state without reading text.
composerControls.userAction: Focus the composer only after a reviewed local chat UI exists.

composerControls.label: attach context
composerControls.launcherAction: Keep attachments disabled and do not read files.
composerControls.userAction: Attach local context only after an explicit artifact input boundary exists.

composerControls.label: send message
composerControls.launcherAction: Keep send disabled while readiness is blocked.
composerControls.userAction: Send only after runtime, model, session, and retention evidence exists.

composerControls.label: clear draft
composerControls.launcherAction: No-op because no draft is captured by this fixture.
composerControls.userAction: Clear only future in-memory draft text owned by the launcher UI.

handoffRefs.summary: Base chat/session state is consumed as local data only.
Chat readiness keeps send controls disabled.
Model status display is consumed as local data only.
Session lifecycle remains disabled or blocked.

inputPolicy.redactionPolicy: prompt text stays outside checked fixtures and status summaries
inputPolicy.summary: Composer fixture carries input control state only; no draft text is stored.

limitations: Data-only chat composer fixture; no prompt text is read, echoed, stored, or persisted.
No attachments, manifests, transcripts, summaries, model paths, generated artifacts, private paths, secrets, or tokens are read or written.
No KV260 hardware access, serial access, SSH execution, network call, provider call, telemetry, upload, or write-back is performed.
Composer send controls remain disabled until chat readiness, runtime, model-load, device-session, and local session evidence are available.
This is not a release, tag, versioned compatibility commitment, MCP, LSP, IDE, marketplace, or telemetry implementation.

validationRules.summary: Composer fixtures and status summaries must not include prompt text.
Runtime readiness remains blocked and not yet evidence-backed.
Model assets are not configured or loaded by this fixture.
No reviewed local session store or retention rule exists.
Attachments require a separate reviewed local artifact input boundary.
External provider state is not used by this local launcher boundary.
